aftermarket_references: Ford Edge European 433 MHz Hitag Pro passive-key family

programming.add_key: Supported only where the selected Ford PATS tool explicitly covers the exact UK Edge build
programming.all_keys_lost: Exact-build coverage required; online Ford security access may apply
programming.route: OBD diagnostic programming or FDRS by operation/build

vehicle_information.notes: The UK Edge was principally supplied with passive start. Store and programming selection must be based on a European 433 MHz application, not the North American 315 MHz key family. Exact OEM part number and operation-level tool IDs remain to be mapped.

vehicle_information.transponder_type: Do not order until keyed ignition is physically confirmed
vehicle_information.frequency_mhz: 433.92 if a genuine European remote-key variant is confirmed
vehicle_information.key_type: Mechanical ignition configuration not established as a normal UK application

programming.add_key: Do not use this record until keyed ignition is physically confirmed
programming.all_keys_lost: Exact configuration and tool coverage required
programming.route: Ford PATS diagnostic route if genuine keyed variant is confirmed

vehicle_information.notes: Retained only to prevent a keyed vehicle being forced into the passive record. The normal UK Edge record is passive start; verify the actual ignition before ordering.

ford_edge_split_audit.title: Ford MPV and SUV Security Split Audit

european_ford_frequency_rule.publisher: Silca and UK Ford application catalogues
european_ford_frequency_rule.title: European Ford remote-frequency cross-reference
european_ford_frequency_rule.evidence: Comparable UK/European Ford Hitag Pro proximity applications use HU101 and 433 MHz; exact Edge OEM reference still requires a direct application match
